# MDE v1.2.13

## Features

- Replaced the left panel theme picker entry with a unified Settings button.
- Added a two-column Settings dialog with AI, Theme, and Check Update sections.
- Moved theme selection and follow-system appearance controls into the Theme settings section.
- Added AI CLI settings that only show installed CLIs, persist the selected CLI, and persist a per-CLI default model name.
- Summary and translation requests now honor the selected AI CLI and pass the configured model to Codex or Claude Code.
- Added a Check Update settings section that shows the current MDE version and can manually check GitHub releases.

## Bug Fixes

- Kept follow-system theme selection behavior intact after moving the control into Settings.
- Avoided stale AI cache reuse when the selected CLI or configured model changes.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit coverage for AI settings persistence and selected CLI/model generation.
- Added integration coverage for forwarding selected AI options through IPC.
- Updated E2E coverage for the new Settings-based theme flow.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run build`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP for Apple Silicon and Intel.
- Windows NSIS installer for x64.
